title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 2–5, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. The crew follows Nami’s trail toward the island ruled by Arlong and begins to learn how dangerous her home is.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: After Sanji, the sorely-needed "Sea Cook" from Baratie, joins the crew,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: CAM

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Wahhh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They now set sail once more. The weather is nice and clear.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey, how long are you gonna cry for?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: cheer up already.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: B-But I'm so touched!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It was truly a beautiful good-bye, brother cook!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You are keeping a check on our boat's direction, right?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Ahhh! I wanna bring back Nami so we can go to grand line already!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You're awfully happy. But even with Nami, don't you still only have 5 people?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Are you seriously planning to go to grand line with only 5 people?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You'll regret it if you underestimate the seas, you hear!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: If it's more crewmembers I need, I can do that in grand line too!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: After all, it's supposed to be a paradise!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Paradise? Don't you mean a pirate's graveyard!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Before I left the restaurant, owner Zeff told me...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hee Hee!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That some people call grand line a paradise!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: that geezer said that...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well, as long as Nami will be there, I won't mind even if it's just the two of us alone...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: You're all being much too naive!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You really know too little about Grand Line!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Not to mention our destination as well! If Brother Zoro had some basic knowledge, then he'd have come back Arlong with me!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And he definitely would've realized just how terrifying,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: The man at the place sister Nami went to is!

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
